feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BOQ Upload VA01 (Sales Order) For Bill of services for more than 100 to 1000+ items
entry.content:
Dear Experts ,

My Client is in the construction industry providing services which turns to be 100 to 1000+ sub-line items 

under Bill of services Structure and main item in the sales order .

How can i create a uploader to create sales order with sub-line items via excel .

Steps: VA01-> Select Item Activities ->Service Specification:Specs for order item 6 000010 Display opens ->Enter Short text , Qty. , Gross Price etc . ->Save the order .

screenshot 1

 

screenshot 2

 

 

Best Regards

Raj Verma

entry.title: Sales order hader text not editable
entry.content:
Login to QW1 :  VA02 : 11056800

Go to header > text > VA01 Internal Popup text ( grey out ) 

but other text is enable to edit eg : Shipping Instructions ( open to add more text )

entry.title: Debit Note process - intercompany Flow without delivery Order
entry.content:
Need to create a debit note with intercompany Process without delivery order.
required the financial Flow also

entry.title: VBOF showing error Log for Agreement 61634
entry.content:
HI Team,

 we need your help in resolving this standard error which is showing while executing the VBOF to update the sales volume for the rebate agreement 61634.

Error : System status CLSD is active.

Best Regard

Shyam Sunder Yaka

entry.title: Profit Center Missing on Customer Account Line Item in Accounting Document
entry.content:
EN
The accounting documents generated from a sales transaction do not have the **profit center** populated on the customer line item. However, the tax line items for that same transaction do have the profit center populated (BSEG - PRCTR).

How can I ensure that the customer line item is also populated with the profit center when the accounting document is generated?

Would this be handled through a system configuration, or would a validation (OB28) and/or custom development be required in SAP GUI?


PT-BR
Os documentos contábeis gerados a partir de uma venda estão sem o centro de lucro preenchido na linha do cliente. Entretanto, as linhas dos impostos dessa venda estão com o centro de lucro preenchido (BSEG - PRCTR). Como faço para que a linha do cliente também fique preenchida desde a geração do documento contábil? É alguma configuração ou uma validação (OB28)/desenvolvimento resolveria no SAP GUI?

entry.title: How to handle MTO process with Advanced Intercompany (5D2)? S4ANA Cloud private eddition
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am looking for clarification on the compatibility between the Advanced Intercompany Sales (5D2) framework and the Make-to-Order (MTO with Variant Configuration & Sales Order Costing) process.

 

  • The Setup: You create a main sales order from the selling company code (e.g., 1010), and you want production to run in the delivering plant (e.g., 1710), using that main sales order as the cost object, so i guess thats a problem.

  • The Production Trigger: If you try to let the automated intercompany sales order trigger the requirement for production, it solves the manufacturing side of the problem in plant 1710.

  • The PGI Roadblock: The issue happens during the Post Goods Issue (PGI). For the outbound delivery to the final customer, you must use the main customer sales order.

  • The Stock Deficit: This main sales order does not have any stock or sales order stock. This is because the production order posted the Goods Receipt (GR) against the intercompany sales order, not the main customer sales order.
    Because the stock is tied to the intercompany order, the final outbound delivery cannot find the inventory to complete the PGI.

My Questions to the Community:

  1. Is there any standard way to bridge this stock-assignment gap between the main sales order and the intercompany order in S/4HANA?

  2. How are you handling variant configuration/custom production when using the Advanced Intercompany framework?

entry.title: Old billing documents that the posting status is open
entry.content: We need to archive old billing documents but the overall status is A due the posting status are in A not completed, we have the recommendation to use the report SDARCHLP for change the status for the billing documents but the program update the last change date, and the residence days were reset. How can we archive changing the overall status to Completed but without change the last change date?

entry.title: Issue in Rounding Off of PO Unit Price – Value Mismatch
entry.content:
Hi

We are facing an issue related to rounding off in Purchase Order (PO) unit pricing.

Although the base price and discount conditions are maintained correctly & same and remain unchanged, the final PO unit Price is showing a mismatch due to rounding differences.

Please check & Revert.

Regards

entry.title: Incoming Sales Order - Flexible Anlysis
entry.content:
Hello all,

In SAP public cloud, when ı use the Incoming Sales Order - Flexible Analysis app, I need to compare sales orders between last year and the current year. 
 
I can read this year compared with the same period last year in this analysis chart. 

When I went into app from the chart I have adjusted the Yr/Mo. of the Creation filter, which is below, but I could not see the comparison with last year.

The value starts from 2026;

Could you please tell me how I can compare last year's and current year's data for sales orders in the app, even if I don't have the value from last year? 

Such as in this help page, there is a functionality for that;

"How is the sales volume this year compared with the same period last year?"

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/e29f3c5822571f60e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US

#flexibleanalysis SAP Data Insight  SD Sales SAP Sales Analysis for Retail SAP Financial Supply Chain Management 

@yusufavci @hasanbayram

entry.title: EXTWG missing Check Table TWEW in KOMG/KOMP — no F4 in VK11
entry.content: Field EXTWG in table MARA has Check Table TWEW assigned. However, the same field in pricing communication structures KOMG and KOMP does not have Check Table TWEW assigned. As a result, no F4 search help is available for field EXTWG when maintaining condition records in VK11 for custom condition table 746.

entry.title: ZLR0 output issue with external send
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Business wants to process ZLR0 output with medium 'External send', but it is failing with error "Communication type cannot be used". However, this output is setup for 'External Send' under Processing routines.

Could you please help us to understand if this output can be used for sending email.

entry.title: V.02 incomplete document
entry.content: Need to complete sales orders which have incompleteness with Shipping point and net value as the feilds are greyed out in VA02 so we are not able to complete the orders.

entry.title: Maintain additional details in customer-info material records in Classify
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to maintain additional details/two customer information records in the VD51 transaction. But SAP doesn't allow two customer material info records for the same material, and we can only add the customer material (KNMT-KDMAT) and customer description (KNMT-POSTX).

Therefore, we maintained the additional details using classify; by creating a class and characteristics, and let me know how this is helpful to you. Also, share your thoughts on this method and any corrections required or any different approach we can use.

Go to Transaction VD51 and enter the customer, sales org., and dist. channel.

Now, enter the material for which we have to maintain the customer material description and add additional details.

Select the line time and click on the Classify button.

Here we have to assign the class: CUST_MAT with class type 052 (customer-material info record)

The custom class for the additional customer material number is CUST_MAT.

Characteristic Value assigned in CUST_MAT Class: -

Fetch details using tables.

Concatenate the sales org + distribution channel + customer + material and pass into table INOB with class type (KLART) 052 and table (OBTAB) KNMT and copy object No. CUOBJ.

Now pass the CUOBJ number into the AUSP table where OBJEK = CUOBJ and fetch ATWRT.

Assignment of Characteristic Type to Class

Characteristic Type Creation CUST_MAT2 Customer Material 2 Created in CT04 and assigned the characteristic type to the class CUST_MAT in CL02.

Maybe help https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/39d6d7a325d04826b95328b25fad91ab/b9cdc353b677b44ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/two-on-one-customer-material/qaq-p/6220339

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/sales-order-item-description-coming-from-customer-material-info-record-cmir/qaq-p/9521256

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/use-same-customer-material-record-for-many-other-customers/qaq-p/10806131

626931 - FAQ: Customer material info record

Regards,
Lovepreet Sidhu

entry.title: Exchange rate issue
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We are implementing India Localization and facing issue related to Exchange rate.

When we are creating Proforma Invoice may be on date 01.06.2026 and exchange rate as M type is maintained that day if it was 90 and after post goods issue we created ZF2 billing type may be on 15.06.2026 and exchange rate changed to 92 then we will have issue in Tax assesable value.

As per requirement we want to prevent it and get exchange rate to be copied from proforma invoice at header level.

is there any way to prevent this as part of India requirement that exchange rate copied from proforma Invoice

entry.title: Material V-GW_PREMIUM does not exist in storage location 2001 VO
entry.content:
Hi,

After upgrade to EHP8 from EHP0 in PDP/QDP,  a Service material V-GW_PREMIUM is giving error that it's not extended to a storage location. where item category is TAX.

For this material General plant data/Storage 1 isn't maintained before or after upgrade but after upgrade we face the error while creating the material

but the same material we are able to create a order in QDX (non upgraded sandbox) this material doesn't have the entry in MARD.

entry.title: Table S066 is not updating automatically when we are creating sales order through EDI in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Issue: Table S066 is not updating automatically when we are creating sales order through EDI in SAP ECC.  But the table S066 is updating automatically when we are creating sales orders through VA01 and also when we are editing the sales order through VA02 which was created through EDI.
Expected solution: Table S066 should get update automatically when we are creating SO through EDI.
Can anyone help us to overcome the issue please?

@Lakshmipathi @sravan_aleshwaram @HenrikeGroetecke - Please provide your insights?
Thanking you in Advance!

entry.title: Idoc error
entry.content: On an intercompany invoice idoc errors and says delivery does not exist

entry.title: Hiding Condition type
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our client's requirements is to not to show the inventory price of the Material to the Salesman. While in the Sales quotation and Sales order Pricing procedure the PCIP Condition type displays the Internal Price which is used to calculate the Profit margin of the Material. This Profit margin value is used in the SAP Standard sales reports because of this I can't remove this condition type from the Pricing procedure, so i want to hide this conditon type in the screen without removing its function in the Sales quotation and Sales order. Please provide me the possible way to achive this requirement or suggest any workaround for this requirement.

Best Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: Price Group Condition ZA00 not working
entry.content: P80-658: group Pricing not working ZA00 condition

entry.title: Freight Condition ZHD0 not distributing to all lines on Invoice
entry.content:
We have a Freight Condition getting updated on delivery header directly . It is coming from interface.

When the invoice is created with reference to delivery, the entire freight value sits on the last time of the invoice. (Please note I am not referring to rounding value but entire freight value)

When the credit memo is created only for the last time, then seems like we are giving the entire freight value back to customer instead of the proportionate value, which is wrong and when credit memo is created for other lines, then there is no credit given to customer for freight. 

However, when we put  Freight condition type on the sales order, then we see that it distributes the freight across all lines. Same information is passed to delivery/invoice. 

And when the credit memo is created for a specific line item, then the proportionate freight is given to customer, which is right. 

I dont think so there is a config issue with condition type as it is same being used on order & delivery. 

So, can you please confirm if this is how SAP Standard works and if there is a way to distribute the freight on all the lines on the invoice if the freight is polulated on delivery directly.
